race.comment: Tough. THE PIRATE QUEEN (10) had been busting to win before her 1.9L defeat at Launceston. Got too far back and may sit closer today. On a 9-day return and up in trip deserves another chance. SOUTH GEORGIA (6) doesn't win out of turn, but would be a winning hope bringing her A-game. Has a low gate and a 2kg claim and switched back from a middle distance today. Expect that to suit much better. VIXEN'S MOON (8) was well in the market over 1400m at Launceston but settled much too far back and didn't get into it. Rated well enough in stronger prior and the step up to 1600m should suit. TIZSA NICE DROP (7) found much better form narrowly beaten over this distance on the synthetic. Gets in well with the 2kg claim and will be around the mark back to turf.
